subject: Physics
title: Why Einstein Got One Nobel
description: A fast breakdown of Why Einstein Got One Nobel for builders.

hook.text: Einstein won the Nobel Prize—but not for relativity. He got it for explaining the photoelectric effect.

buildup.text: The Nobel committee found relativity too controversial. Many physicists still doubted it in 1921.

discovery.text: The photoelectric effect was safer—Einstein showed light comes in energy packets called photons.

twist.text: This Nobel-winning work helped launch quantum mechanics—a theory Einstein later fought against.

climax.text: He used the prize money to pay his ex-wife as part of their divorce settlement.

punchline.text: Nobel for photons, not relativity. Even geniuses get underrated.

quiz.question: Why didn't Einstein receive the Nobel Prize for relativity?
options: The committee considered it too controversial
He never submitted it for consideration
